prompt: A minimalist studio product photograph of a single human hand holding a modern smartphone upright in portrait orientation against a smooth lavender-to-pink gradient background. The composition is centered slightly left, with the forearm entering from the lower right corner and the hand wrapping naturally around the phone, fingers visible along the left edge and thumb on the right side. Use dramatic neon gel lighting with cool blue light on the left side of the hand and deep magenta-purple shadows on the right, creating a moody futuristic tech-ad aesthetic. The phone should resemble a premium edge-to-edge device with a black bezel, rounded corners, and a pill-shaped front camera cutout at the top. On the screen, show a clean monochrome landing page for a design-tech product: a small abstract black logo in the upper left, a rounded small button labeled "Menu" in the upper right, 2 wide pale rectangular placeholder content blocks stacked near the top, and centered onboarding text in the lower half. The main headline reads Welcome to the future of design with Terot. Below it, smaller gray body text reads Create intelligent design systems and AI-powered visual experiences.. Beneath that, include exactly 2 call-to-action elements: a rounded outlined button labeled Create account and a simple text link underneath labeled Login. The overall style is sleek, high-end, editorial, and cinematic, with soft shadows, realistic skin texture, subtle screen glow, and generous negative space.
